name: Date/Time
description: Provide date and time related information.

current_date_time.description: Tell the current date and time.

current_week_number.description: Tell the current week number of the year.

days_countdown.description: Count how many days remain until a target date.

target_date.description: The target calendar date to count down to.

current_date_time_with_time_zone.description: Tell the local date and time for a requested place or time zone.

time_zone.description: The IANA time zone identifier, for example Europe/Paris or America/New_York.

location_name.description: A friendly label for the requested location, for example Paris or New York.
